final:
module top_module(input [7:0] obf_a, input [7:0] b, input [2:0] op, output reg [15:0] res);always @(*) begin
        case(op)
            3'b000: res = obf_a + b; // Addition
            3'b001: res = obf_a - b; // Subtraction
            3'b010: res = obf_a * b; // Multiplication
            3'b011: res = obf_a / b; // Division
            default: res = 16'b0; // Default value
        endcase
    end

endmodule
